title: lomatium knokei
intro: Lomatium knokei is a perennial plant species native to the western United States, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lomatium knokei include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as the common cold and flu. Lomatium knokei is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and can be used topically to aid in wound healing and internally to promote overall well-being.
